overall.description: First-person cockpit view from a space simulation game showing a teal-colored planet with a bright star overhead. The player is piloting a spacecraft in orbit, briefly interacts with controls, and begins descent toward the planet surface with high-fidelity holographic HUD elements visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: spaceship cockpit in high orbit above teal planet

agents.ego_description: sitting in cockpit observing the planet surface and starfield while maintaining stable orbit

entered.detail: metallic cockpit window frame with dashboard controls at bottom of viewport
large teal-colored planet with curved horizon and atmospheric haze
intensely bright white star creating lens flare above the planet
dense field of distant stars against black space background

segments.scene_description: The scene opens with a stable first-person view from a spacecraft cockpit, looking out at a teal planet with a bright star overhead. The camera remains steady as the pilot observes the orbital view, with the planet's curved horizon dominating the lower frame and holographic displays visible on the dashboard.

events.description: camera pans left as pilot reaches for side controls, revealing gloved hand and shifting planet view
camera returns to center forward position, resuming standard forward view

agents.ego_description: reaching toward left side control panel with gloved hand visible, adjusting spacecraft systems

entered.detail: gloved pilot hand reaching toward left side control panel with visible arm and wrist

segments.scene_description: The pilot briefly interacts with the spacecraft controls, causing the camera to pan left and reveal the pilot's gloved hand reaching toward a side panel. The planet shifts to the left of the frame before the camera returns to center, completing the interaction sequence.

events.description: spacecraft begins noticeable descent with planet surface details becoming more prominent and horizon line shifting

agents.ego_description: piloting the spacecraft in a descent trajectory toward the planet surface, maintaining forward orientation

segments.scene_description: Following the control interaction, the spacecraft continues its descent toward the teal planet. The planet gradually grows larger in the viewport, with surface textures becoming increasingly detailed as the ship loses altitude, while the bright star remains fixed overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a spacecraft cockpit as it transitions from a stable orbital observation to a rapid descent toward a teal planet. It begins with a steady view of the planet's curved horizon and a bright star overhead, framed by holographic displays on the dashboard. As the pilot interacts with the controls, the camera pans left to reveal a gloved hand reaching toward a side panel, causing the planet to shift momentarily in the viewport. The scene then centers once more as the spacecraft begins its dive, with the teal surface gradually expanding to fill the frame. Finally, the planet grows increasingly larger and its surface textures become more detailed as the ship loses altitude under the fixed glow of the distant star.
